topic: Are arbitration clauses in unstamped or insufficiently-stamped agreements enforceable in India?
notes: Presolv360 domain-fit sample. A genuinely contested->settled authority: the 7-judge 'In Re Interplay' (Dec 2023) overruled the 5-judge 'NN Global' (Apr 2023). Exercises consensus (clauses are enforceable) vs contested (enforceable-but-not-admissible caveat; lingering curative-petition doubt) vs superseded-by-judgment (NN Global overruled) — with citations an arbitrator could actually rely on. Note: Cyril Amarchand (a source here) incubated Presolv360.
